title: Phase 1A: Prisma, Redis, Socket.io singletons and root layout
description: Create singleton instances for Prisma client, Redis client, and Socket.io server. Create the root layout with font loading and theme support.
steps: Create src/lib/prisma.ts with Prisma client singleton (dev hot-reload safe)
Create src/lib/redis.ts with Redis/ioredis client singleton
Create src/lib/socket.ts with Socket.io server setup and event namespace configuration
Create src/app/layout.tsx with root layout, font loading (JetBrains Mono + Instrument Sans), metadata
Set up dark mode as primary theme with light mode toggle support
